Oknha Oum Chhay Street, Mondul II Village, Svay Dangkum Commune, Siem Reap, Kingdom Of Cambodia. - +855 98 716 555 / +855 63 965 198

koulen hotel, Siem Reap

Our all-Khmer staff welcomes you to Cambodia! We named our hotel Koulen after the sacred place where our kingdom was founded, and we want every moment to reflect the rich Cambodian nature as well as our history and heritage. Every moment you are in the Koulen Hotel, we want to offer you the best of our Kingdom of Wonder.
Located just behind the Royal Palace and one block from the Siem Reap River, we feel obligated to provide you with the best of everything Khmer in a relaxing spiritual location. We seek to make each day as fresh and beautiful for you as our country. Whether you stay with us for a few days, a few weeks, or as long as you can, we hope that the Koulen Hotel will be your home in Siem Reap.  

What's nearby in siem reap  
 
Best rate guarantee 
 

What's nearby in Siem Reap:

  • TOUS les JOURS - 50 m
  • Koulen II restaunt - 100 m
  • Saiko Japanese Restaurant -100 m
  • Sala Cafe - 0 m
  • Starbucks - 50 m
  • Supermarket - 50 m
  • Pub-street Area - 1.2 km
  • Angkor National Museum - 650 m
  • Angkor Panorama Museum - 3.1 km
  • Siem Reap War Museum - 4 km
  • Landmine Museum - 14 km
  • Angkor Silk Farm - 15 km
  • Angkor Wat - 6 km
  • Bak Kheng Mountain - 7 km
  • Koulen Mountain - 81 km
  • Siem Reap River - 300 m
  • Tonle Sap - 31 km

Our hotel gives guests quick and easy access to the city’s business district in minutes and also offers a mesmerizing view of the city from its suites.

Koulen Hotel has a 24-hour front desk service to assist guests with local tours/tickets. Free Wi-Fi is also provided to keep you connected.

A CAPITAL CITY SANCTUARY

Accomodation

Luxury Double Suite

A unique private suite with spacious features and luxury amenities.

One King bed, a living room with a sofa, a kitchenette, and a balcony. City view.
80 (M²) / 861 (FT²)
2 adults, or 1 adult and 1 child
Details 

Two-Bedroom Suite

A unique suite for two couples / a small friend group / small family features a spacious place in a big living room in which children can walk around or have a small party. ...

Two King beds, a big living room with a sofa and table, a kitchenette, two bathrooms, and balconies
120 (M²) / 1291 (FT²)
4 adults, or 3 Adults and 1 child, or 2 adults and 2 children

Three-Bedroom Suite

A popular suite for family or group, spacious living room, great views, and features luxury amenities. Both leisure and business travelers are almost booked for this suite b ...

Three King beds, or Two King beds and one twin bed, a huge living room with sofa and table, a kitchenette, three bathrooms, and balconies.

6 Adults, or 5 adults and 1 child, or 4 adults and 2 children, or 3 adults and 3 children, or 2 adults and 4 children

A bigger unique suite is designed for the average family/group by allowing stay together, with a bigger living room, located on a higher floor and features luxury amenities. ...

Four King beds, a huge living room with sofa and table, four bathrooms, and balconies.
260 (M²) / 2798 (FT²)

Massage & Spa at Sala Spa

Our brilliant group is completely prepared an expert, and it is our plan to offer; the best back rub in Siem Reap,We welcome you to investigate our menu of unwinding excellence and well being focused treatments, our back rub and spa has turned into the most prominent day spa in Siem Reap. #koulenhotel

Explore Koulen Hotel, Siem Reap through Facebook, and Instagram. Share your own experiences by using @koulenhotel and #koulenhotel.

@Outdoor Pool
@Three-Bedroom Suite
@Entrance
@Fitness Center
@Poolside Bar
@Outdoor Pool

Our courtyard and gardens are larger than the hotel so that we can reflect our national origin. Amid a variety of trees and flowers, we have a large pool, specially designed with Khmer art and with areas for experienced swimmers as well as playful children.

@Three-Bedroom Suite

A popular suite for family or group, spacious living room, great views, and features luxury amenities. Both leisure and business travelers are almost booked for this suite because it's useful at all times for a stay, a short brief early, a discussion late at night, etc. Almost recommended by guests.

@Entrance

Exterior view. Sunset time. Beautiful building. Convenience location.
Location: Next to Heritage Walk. Nearby Preah Ang Chek Preah Ang Chorm Shrine. Nearby Royal Residence. In front of Lucky Mail.

@Fitness Center

For anyone seeking a heavy workout or a gentle one, we offer a variety of modern, exercise equipment for the athlete or the amateur. Whether building muscle or working off a few calories, we want you to find the resources that you want while staying with us.

@Poolside Bar

In the corner of our courtyard, we offer guests a variety of soft drinks, juices, cocktails, or ice water served from our bar specially designed with natural Khmer materials to blend into the garden setting. We offer lounge chairs by the pool as well as tables and chairs for al fresco dining or socializing.
